_comment: Large runtime artifacts hosted outside Git.
The model checkpoint and embedding index total ~1.5 GB, which exceeds
GitHub's free Git LFS allowance (1 GB storage, 1 GB/month bandwidth).
Hosting them on Zenodo keeps clones small and gives the release a DOI.
TO PUBLISH: upload the files listed below to a Zenodo record, then replace
each null 'url' with its direct download link and set 'record_url'/'doi'.
Until then fetch_artifacts.py runs in verify-only mode against local files.
Checksums were computed from the known-good local copies and are valid
regardless of where the files are ultimately hosted.

artifacts.description: ARCHS4 embedding index: 940455 samples x 512 dims, float16 memmap.
Per-sample GEO accession and shard location for the embedding index.
